recording.recordTooltip: Record a voiceover synced to the playhead
recording.stopTooltip: Stop and add the take to the timeline
recording.headphonesHint: Use headphones so timeline audio is not captured by the mic.

errors.unsupported: Microphone recording is not supported in this browser.
errors.permissionDenied: Microphone access was blocked. Allow mic access in your browser and try again.
errors.noDevice: No microphone was found. Connect a mic and try again.
errors.deviceBusy: The microphone is being used by another app.
errors.startFailed: Could not start recording. Please try again.
